name: Agentify
description: Agent Interface Compiler — transforms OpenAPI specs into 9 agent interface formats (MCP Server, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, Skills, llms.txt, GEMINI.md, A2A Card, CLI)

skills.name: transform
skills.description: Transform an OpenAPI specification into agent interface formats. Run: npx agentify-cli transform <input> [-o dir] [-n name] [-f formats...]

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: URL or file path to an OpenAPI spec (Swagger 2.0 or OAS 3.x)

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: -f, --format <formats...> — Output formats: mcp, claude.md, agents.md, cursorrules, skills, llms.txt, gemini.md, a2a, cli

skills.name: self-describe
skills.description: Output Agentify's own agent interface files (skills.json, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md). Run: npx agentify-cli self-describe [-o dir]
